    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Requests for buyer lifestyle or hobbies (e.g., yoga, cycling, photography, gardening) to tailor listings or services', 'Mentions of property amenities like coworking lounges, art gallery access, or creative community traits not captured by allowed fields', 'Requests to match mortgage or legal services to buyer lifestyle or creative profile', 'Inclusion of incentive details (e.g., CMHC First-Time Buyer Incentive, land transfer tax rebate, eco-rebate) not defined in financing_options fields', 'References to estimated closing timelines (e.g., 45–60 days) not representable in any date or timeline field']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Property listings with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, layout type, and location', 'Property features such as modern finishes, balconies, and energy efficiency', 'Building age and availability status', 'Accessibility and maintenance level indicators (e.g., low maintenance)', 'Eco-friendly attributes like energy-efficient appliances (mapped under special_features)', 'Viewing availability and move-in readiness', 'Financing options including down payment, interest rate, and term years', 'Legal service packages with cost, service type, and duration', 'Moving service levels (basic, standard, premium, white_glove)', 'Utility setup packages with included services and costs', 'Service scheduling and availability statuses', 'Summaries of total estimated costs or closing costs (mapped to total_package_summary fields)', 'Requests for client requirements like budget range, location preferences, or financing method (covered under client_requirements_requests)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Requests for buyer lifestyle or hobbies (e.g., yoga, cycling, photography, gardening) to tailor listings or services', 'Mentions of property amenities like coworking lounges, art gallery access, or creative community traits not captured by allowed fields', 'Requests to match mortgage or legal services to buyer lifestyle or creative profile', 'Inclusion of incentive details (e.g., CMHC First-Time Buyer Incentive, land transfer tax rebate, eco-rebate) not defined in financing_options fields', 'References to estimated closing timelines (e.g., 45–60 days) not representable in any date or timeline field']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 13, ['Property listings with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, layout type, and location', 'Property features such as modern finishes, balconies, and energy efficiency', 'Building age and availability status', 'Accessibility and maintenance level indicators (e.g., low maintenance)', 'Eco-friendly attributes like energy-efficient appliances (mapped under special_features)', 'Viewing availability and move-in readiness', 'Financing options including down payment, interest rate, and term years', 'Legal service packages with cost, service type, and duration', 'Moving service levels (basic, standard, premium, white_glove)', 'Utility setup packages with included services and costs', 'Service scheduling and availability statuses', 'Summaries of total estimated costs or closing costs (mapped to total_package_summary fields)', 'Requests for client requirements like budget range, location preferences, or financing method (covered under client_requirements_requests)']
